text: refactored and redesigned imageeditor component: The ImageEditor component has been refactored and redesigned; existing code using the old ImageEditor API may break or behave differently.
gr.Dataframe now maps search-filtered row indices to original data indices, so any code that relied on row indices after filtering will see different values.
gr.NativePlot no longer sorts labels as default behaviour, so plots that previously had sorted labels may now display labels in a different order.
gr.ChatInterface now unrenders the user-provided textbox and re-renders it in the correct position as part of gr.Blocks, so any custom textbox may appear in a different location.
conversations in chat history were in one order: The order of conversations in chat history has been reversed, so any code parsing chat history will see messages in the opposite order.

meta.symbol: conversations in chat history were in one order

text: uses request.url instead of root_url: Stop relying on root_url for API call path construction; get_api_call_path() now uses request.url.
Stop relying on gr.DeepLinkButton defaulting to primary variant; it now defaults to secondary variant.
Stop using fixed layouts in gr.Dataframe; they have been removed.
previous gr.dataframe api/behavior: gr.Dataframe has been refactored; existing code using the old API may break.
gr.Textbox lines logic has been moved to frontend; existing code relying on backend lines behavior may break.
gr.load now creates a streaming chatinterface by default instead of non-streaming.
resizable (corrected spelling): Stop using the misspelled `resizable` parameter in `gr.Chatbot`; use the correctly spelled `resizable` parameter instead.
Stop relying on all columns being scrollable; columns can now be frozen in gr.Dataframe, which may change layout behavior.
Stop assuming the toolbar has no search bar; an optional search bar is now available in gr.Dataframe's toolbar, which may affect toolbar layout.
Stop assuming only individual cells can be selected; entire rows or columns can now be selected in gr.Dataframe, which may change selection event behavior.
Stop assuming tags are not supported; gr.Chatbot now has an allow_tags parameter that may change message rendering.
1920px wide resolution added for wide monitors: Stop assuming the maximum layout width is smaller; a 1920px wide resolution is now supported for wide monitors, which may change component sizing.

meta.symbol: 1920px wide resolution added for wide monitors

text: editable text changes have been reverted: Stop relying on any editable text behavior that was recently introduced; those changes have been reverted.

meta.symbol: editable text changes have been reverted

text: gr.plot change/load events worked correctly: gr.Plot change/load events were broken and have been fixed; if you relied on the broken behavior (events not firing), your code may now behave differently.

plotly 5.x javascript was used: The installed Plotly JavaScript version has been updated to support Plotly 6.0; if you depend on the old Plotly JS version's behavior or CSS, your plots may render differently.
gr.Dataframe now correctly applies the max_height parameter; if you previously relied on max_height being ignored (e.g. dataframe always expanding), your layout may now be constrained.

meta.symbol: max_height was not applied in gr.dataframe

text: Tabs inside a Row now expand by default; if you relied on tabs not expanding (e.g. expecting them to stay collapsed or sized differently), your layout will change.
dataframe is not editable when interactive is false: Stop relying on DataFrame being editable when interactive is False; it is now properly non-editable.

meta.symbol: dataframe is not editable when interactive is false

text: postprocess behavior with empty dataframes (could get headers incorrectly or error): Stop relying on the old postprocess behavior for empty DataFrames; headers of empty dataframes are now handled differently.

meta.symbol: postprocess behavior with empty dataframes (could get headers incorrectly or error)

text: Stop relying on mic permissions being requested at component load; mic permissions are now requested only after the Record button is clicked in gr.Audio().
cropping now crops only the background image, not the canvas overlay: Stop assuming cropping affects the full composite (image + canvas); cropping now crops only the background image in ImageEditor.

meta.symbol: cropping now crops only the background image, not the canvas overlay

text: Stop relying on setting gr.ImageEditor value to None being a no-op; it now clears the editor.
All MD5 hashes have been replaced with SHA256 hashes; any code relying on MD5 hash values will break.
Stop relying on the CSS tag that overrode Gradio theme settings; it has been removed.

meta.symbol: css tag that overrode gradio theme setting

text: value 0 was ignored (treated as falsy/empty): gr.Slider and gr.Number now accept 0 as a valid value instead of ignoring it.
row_count=0 was not handled (likely caused issues): gr.Dataframe now correctly handles row_count=0 instead of misbehaving.

meta.symbol: row_count=0 was not handled (likely caused issues)

text: upper-case python types (e.g. `list`, `dict`, `tuple`): API typing information now uses modern lower-case Python types (`list`, `dict`, `tuple`) instead of upper-case types (`List`, `Dict`, `Tuple`).
previous bubble_full_width behaviour: The `bubble_full_width` behaviour in Chatbot has been tweaked, which may change how existing chat bubbles are rendered.
consecutive messages displayed in separate bubbles by default: By default, consecutive messages are now displayed in the same bubble, controlled by the new `display_consecutive_in_same_bubble` param.

meta.symbol: consecutive messages displayed in separate bubbles by default

text: `import python_multipart`: The import for multipart has been renamed from `multipart` to `python_multipart` to fix a ModuleNotFoundError.
Stop using HfFolder.get_token() and use get_token() instead to retrieve the Hugging Face token.

gr.slider did not accept negative values: gr.Slider now accepts negative values where previously it did not; existing code that relied on negative values being rejected or clamped may behave differently.

meta.symbol: gr.slider did not accept negative values

text: filedata payloads without a `meta` key were accepted during preprocess: Stop sending FileData payloads without a `meta` key during preprocess; the `meta` key is now required.

meta.symbol: filedata payloads without a `meta` key were accepted during preprocess

text: Replace async_get_with_secure_transport() with safehttpx.get() for HTTP requests.
gr.DateTime with include_time=False now uses the system timezone instead of UTC.
python-multipart version 0.0.13 is now excluded from the dependency range.
gr.dropdown could not have none as initial value (no value selected): Set gr.Dropdown value to None to have no initial selection; previously this was not possible.

meta.symbol: gr.dropdown could not have none as initial value (no value selected)

text: Stop relying on gr.Row having equal_height=True by default; it is now False by default, so rows will no longer have equal heights unless you explicitly set equal_height=True.
Stop relying on caching happening at gr.Examples() creation; caching now happens when Blocks is launched.

meta.symbol: caching occurred at creation of gr.examples()

text: Stop using `suggestions` parameter in Chatbot; use `examples` instead.
accepting pathlib.path objects to indicate filepaths: Stop passing string filepaths to `css`, `js`, and `head` parameters; use `pathlib.Path` objects instead.

meta.symbol: accepting pathlib.path objects to indicate filepaths

text: raising a warning when the number of output components does not match the number of values returned from a function, and allowing skipping an arbitrary number of output components: If the number of output components does not match the number of values returned from a function, a warning is now raised (previously silent). You can skip an arbitrary number of output components.

meta.symbol: raising a warning when the number of output components does not match the number of values returned from a function, and allowing skipping an arbitrary number of output components

text: gr.make_waveform function: Stop using gr.make_waveform; it has been removed entirely.
matplotlib as a dependency of gradio: matplotlib is no longer a dependency of gradio; code relying on it being available via gradio will break.

meta.symbol: matplotlib as a dependency of gradio

text: Liking user messages in gr.Chatbot is now disabled by default; you must explicitly enable it if you want the feature.
Files are no longer automatically moved to cache in gr.Chatbot postprocess; you must handle file caching explicitly.

checksum mismatch for binary files produced a warning: Checksum mismatches for binary files now raise an error instead of a warning, which will break any code that relied on the warning-only behaviour.

meta.symbol: checksum mismatch for binary files produced a warning

text: importlib_resources as a dependency: The importlib_resources dependency has been removed; code relying on it being available via gradio will break.
urllib3 as a dependency (non-wasm environments): The urllib3 dependency has been removed in non-Wasm environments; code relying on it being available via gradio will break.

content_disposition_type = 'attachment' headers are not attached for files explicitly allowed by the developer: Files explicitly allowed by the developer no longer get 'attachment' content-disposition headers, changing how browsers handle them (inline vs download).

meta.symbol: content_disposition_type = 'attachment' headers are not attached for files explicitly allowed by the developer

text: Placeholder text in a disabled gr.Textbox now appears gray instead of black.
In gr.ChatInterface, typing is now disabled while a response is generating.
gr.multimodaltextbox did not accept plain string values: gr.MultimodalTextbox now accepts plain string values in addition to its previous format.

meta.symbol: gr.multimodaltextbox did not accept plain string values

text: submit and stop buttons are now built into gr.chatinterface(multimodal=false) and added as props to gr.textbox() and gr.multimodaltext(): Stop using submit/stop buttons from inside ChatInterface; they are now props on gr.Textbox and gr.MultimodalTextbox.

meta.symbol: submit and stop buttons are now built into gr.chatinterface(multimodal=false) and added as props to gr.textbox() and gr.multimodaltext()

text: buttons moved from chatinterface into chatbot: Stop relying on buttons being part of ChatInterface; they are now inside the Chatbot component.

meta.symbol: buttons moved from chatinterface into chatbot

text: gr.Tabs has been redesigned; existing CSS overrides or layout assumptions may break.
gr.Button has been redesigned; existing CSS overrides or layout assumptions may break.
Stop relying on the old default variant for gr.LoginButton and gr.DuplicateButton; the new default is 'huggingface'.
gr.Image now has a 'None' option for image_mode to disable it; existing code that relied on image_mode always being set may need updating.
old default font: The default core Gradio font has been updated; existing font overrides or layout assumptions may break.
decreased component radii and removed input shadows: Component border radii have been decreased and input shadows removed; existing CSS overrides or layout assumptions may break.

meta.symbol: decreased component radii and removed input shadows

text: api routes were not prefixed: API routes are now prefixed; existing code that hits API endpoints at the old paths will break.
Stop relying on a default token being passed in gr.load(); no token is passed by default anymore.
python 3.8 and 3.9 supported: Stop using Python 3.8 or 3.9; Gradio now requires Python 3.10 or higher.
gr.Slider() has been redesigned; existing slider code may break due to visual or API changes.
Stop using type='tuples' for gr.Chatbot; it is deprecated in favor of the 'messages' type.
Stop relying on a default audio format in gr.Audio; the default format is now None to avoid unnecessary preprocessing.
Stop passing a tuple as the value for gr.Code; it is deprecated.
machine-specific hashes used: Stop relying on IP addresses being used; they have been replaced with machine-specific hashes.
A new strict_cors parameter has been added to launch(); existing CORS behavior may change if you don't set it.
grey background present: The grey background behind all components has been removed; existing UI layouts relying on that background may look different.
A max_length parameter has been added to gr.TextBox(); existing code may need updating if it relied on unlimited input length.
starlette.request was part of predictbody: starlette.Request is no longer part of PredictBody; it is now only set in the new PredictBodyInternal object.
gr.TextBox now has a max_length parameter that sets the maxlength attribute on the underlying textarea/input HTML element, which may truncate user input silently.
gr.Image now has a 'None' option for the image_mode parameter to disable image mode, which changes the default behaviour of the component.
fastapi<0.113.0 pinned: fastapi is now pinned to versions below 0.113.0 in requirements.txt, which may break projects that depend on fastapi>=0.113.0.
ChatInterface no longer uses gr.State variables internally; it now uses the Chatbot component, which may break code that relied on accessing or manipulating internal state variables.

gr.request was only passed if type hint was exactly `request`: Functions with type hint `Request | None` will now receive a `gr.Request` object instead of `None`, which may break code that expected `None` in that parameter.

meta.symbol: gr.request was only passed if type hint was exactly `request`

text: In Wasm mode, gr.Plot now defaults to PNG format instead of the previous default.
`data` param is now required (non-optional): The `data` parameter in `submit` and `predict` methods is no longer optional and must be provided.
cors validation was not performed when request had a cookie: CORS validation is now performed when the request has a cookie, which may cause cross-origin requests with cookies to be rejected.

meta.symbol: cors validation was not performed when request had a cookie

text: these environment variables were not comma-separated (likely single path or different format): GRADIO_ALLOWED_PATHS and GRADIO_BLOCKED_PATHS environment variables now accept comma-separated values instead of a single path or other format.

meta.symbol: these environment variables were not comma-separated (likely single path or different format)

text: file_count parameter did not exist (single file upload only): gr.MultimodalTextbox now has a file_count parameter defaulting to 'single'; set file_count='multiple' to allow multiple file uploads.

meta.symbol: file_count parameter did not exist (single file upload only)

text: gr.Plot, gr.BarPlot, gr.LinePlot, and gr.ScatterPlot now have different color and width sizing that may break existing visual layouts.
gr.Chatbot now accepts Gradio components as messages, which changes how message content is structured and rendered.
gr.Chatbot now supports HTML in messages, which may change how HTML strings are rendered vs escaped.
gr.Markdown now has an optional height parameter and overflow scrollbar, which may change layout if height is set.

show_progress='full' (default) showed orange progress animation for generators: Set show_progress='minimal' or 'hidden' in event definitions to disable the orange progress animation for generators; the parameter now behaves as originally intended.

meta.symbol: show_progress='full' (default) showed orange progress animation for generators

text: deprecated parameters in python client: Stop using deprecated parameters in the Python Client; they have been removed.

client.submit() returns a promise/not async iterable: Client.submit() now returns an AsyncIterable instead of a Promise, so you must iterate over it with `for await...of` or consume it as an async iterable.

meta.symbol: client.submit() returns a promise/not async iterable

text: Model3D now uses a right-handed coordinate system instead of left-handed, which will flip the orientation of 3D models.
gr.load() could not load demos with custom components: gr.load() now requires custom components to be installed and imported in your Python session before loading a Space that uses them.

meta.symbol: gr.load() could not load demos with custom components

text: Stop using `eventSource_Factory`; it has been renamed.
Stop using `fetch_implementation`; it has been renamed.
The redundant event source logic has been removed; any code relying on that logic will break.
default file upload size limit is now enforced: File uploads now have a default size limit; you must configure `max_file_size` explicitly if you need larger uploads.

meta.symbol: default file upload size limit is now enforced

text: max_file_size parameter in launch() limits each file upload size: Stop relying on unlimited file uploads; set max_file_size in launch() to enforce a per-file size limit.

meta.symbol: max_file_size parameter in launch() limits each file upload size

text: error states could not be dismissed/cleared by users: Stop assuming error states are persistent; users can now clear error states by clicking the x icon on the component.

meta.symbol: error states could not be dismissed/cleared by users

text: gradio_cache_examples environment variable took effect regardless of whether `fn` and `outputs` parameters were provided: Stop relying on GRADIO_CACHE_EXAMPLES to cache examples when `fn` and `outputs` are not provided; it will now silently do nothing.

meta.symbol: gradio_cache_examples environment variable took effect regardless of whether `fn` and `outputs` parameters were provided

text: errors from app.submit() were not cached/shown on frontend: Errors from app.submit() are now cached and displayed on the frontend, which may change error visibility behavior.

meta.symbol: errors from app.submit() were not cached/shown on frontend

text: configs were stored globally/shared across sessions: Configs are now stored per session in the backend instead of globally, which may break code that assumed shared config state across sessions.

meta.symbol: configs were stored globally/shared across sessions

text: custom js function caller concatenates outputs of a dep to the inputs as the arguments: Custom JS function caller now concatenates outputs to inputs as arguments instead of passing only outputs, which changes the argument list for custom JS functions.

meta.symbol: custom js function caller concatenates outputs of a dep to the inputs as the arguments

text: users are now logged out if their oauth token has expired: Users are now automatically logged out when their HF OAuth token has expired, which may break sessions that previously continued working with expired tokens.

meta.symbol: users are now logged out if their oauth token has expired

text: label component's value change detection is fixed to avoid infinite loop: Label component's value change detection was fixed to avoid infinite loops, which may change how change events fire for Label components.

meta.symbol: label component's value change detection is fixed to avoid infinite loop

text: urllib3 (any version): Add an explicit dependency of `urllib3~=2.0`; existing code relying on urllib3<2.0 may break.
cropping rounds [x, y, w, h] before cropping: Coordinates [x, y, w, h] are now rounded before cropping to avoid unexpected interpolation on pixel values, which may change crop results.

meta.symbol: cropping rounds [x, y, w, h] before cropping

text: gr.State variables are now automatically deleted 60 minutes after the user disconnects from the webpage.
blocks.unload() event runs cleanup functions when users disconnect: Blocks.unload() event now runs arbitrary cleanup functions when users disconnect from the webpage.

meta.symbol: blocks.unload() event runs cleanup functions when users disconnect

text: gr.state delete_callback parameter: Stop using the `delete_callback` parameter of `gr.State`; it is no longer supported.
gr.Chatbot now accepts a placeholder argument.
iterators kept running after js client disconnected: Iterators stop running when the JS client disconnects, which may break code that relied on iterators continuing after disconnect.

meta.symbol: iterators kept running after js client disconnected

text: refactored cors middleware to be much faster: CORS middleware was refactored to be much faster, which may change behaviour for code relying on the old middleware's specific timing or ordering.

meta.symbol: refactored cors middleware to be much faster

text: pre and postprocess no longer run in a threadpool: Stop relying on pre/postprocessing running in a separate thread; they now execute synchronously on the main thread, which may cause blocking or change timing-dependent behavior.

meta.symbol: pre and postprocess no longer run in a threadpool

text: Stop using example_inputs(); use example_payload() and example_value() instead.
Files must now be supplied as `file(...)` in the Client instead of previous formats.

uses x-forwarded-host header to determine root url; users can provide full root_path to override: Root URL is now determined using the x-forwarded-host header, and users can provide a full root_path to override the auto-detected value.

meta.symbol: uses x-forwarded-host header to determine root url; users can provide full root_path to override

text: mounted gradio apps can now work with external/arbitrary authentication providers: Mounted Gradio apps now support external/arbitrary authentication providers, which may change how auth is configured for existing apps.

meta.symbol: mounted gradio apps can now work with external/arbitrary authentication providers

text: root_url logic for streaming files has been fixed/changed: The root_url logic for streaming files has been fixed, which may change how file URLs are resolved in streaming scenarios.

meta.symbol: root_url logic for streaming files has been fixed/changed

text: Pyodide has been upgraded to 0.25.0, which may break code relying on the old Pyodide version's APIs or behavior.

additional paths are now blocked to prevent credential leakage on windows: Additional paths that could trigger credential leakage on Windows are now prevented, which may break code relying on those paths.

meta.symbol: additional paths are now blocked to prevent credential leakage on windows

text: paths starting with // or \\ are now prevented: Paths beginning with `//` or `\\` are now prevented, which may break code that relied on such paths.

meta.symbol: paths starting with // or \\ are now prevented

text: loose cors rules: CORS rules are now tightened, which may break cross-origin requests that were previously allowed.
components could work with non-uploaded files: Components are now prevented from working with non-uploaded files, so any code relying on passing file paths directly without uploading will break.

meta.symbol: components could work with non-uploaded files

text: the fix from #7444 is made more general, blocking more /file= filepaths that could expose credentials on windows: Stop using /file= filepaths that reference credential-exposing locations on Windows; the block is now more general and will reject more paths.

meta.symbol: the fix from #7444 is made more general, blocking more /file= filepaths that could expose credentials on windows

text: password comparison may have been vulnerable to timing attacks: Stop relying on password comparison timing being consistent; Gradio now uses timing-safe comparison, so timing-based guessing will no longer work.

meta.symbol: password comparison may have been vulnerable to timing attacks

text: `/file=` filepaths that could expose credentials on windows are now blocked: Stop using `/file=` filepaths that contain credentials on Windows; they will be blocked.

meta.symbol: `/file=` filepaths that could expose credentials on windows are now blocked

text: static while pending behaviour (button shows static state while processing): Stop relying on gr.Button showing a static state while pending; the static-while-pending behaviour has been removed.

meta.symbol: static while pending behaviour (button shows static state while processing)

text: gr.File() now shows a remove button for each file in the file preview, allowing individual file removal.
file normalization was handled in the frontend of each component: File normalization has been moved from the frontend to the backend for all components.

meta.symbol: file normalization was handled in the frontend of each component

text: set_documentation_group was a functional call: set_documentation_group is now a no-op and should not be relied upon for any behaviour.
root url is no longer cached: Stop caching root URL; the root URL is now fetched fresh each time instead of being cached.

meta.symbol: root url is no longer cached

text: flag_dir parameter in read_from_flag(): The flag_dir parameter has been removed from read_from_flag().
The Inference API has been renamed to Serverless Inference Endpoints.
kwargs parameter in template components: Stop passing kwargs to template components; they are no longer accepted.
before_fn and after_fn ran only once before/after the entire generator: before_fn and after_fn now execute on every generator iteration instead of once before/after the entire generator.

meta.symbol: before_fn and after_fn ran only once before/after the entire generator

text: Stop using .as_example() and use .process_example() instead.
Calling gr.update(value=[]) on a gr.File() component now clears the file instead of being ignored or causing an error.
The default order of sources for gr.Video has been switched so that upload is the default instead of recording.
audio elements in chatbot had custom styles applied: Stop relying on custom styles being applied to audio elements inside the Chatbot component, as those styles have been removed.

meta.symbol: audio elements in chatbot had custom styles applied

text: distutils.strictversion was used for version comparison: Stop using distutils.StrictVersion as it has been replaced for Python 3.12 compatibility.

meta.symbol: distutils.strictversion was used for version comparison

text: separate queues for each concurrency id: Queue now uses separate queues per concurrency id instead of a single shared queue, which changes how concurrent requests are handled.

meta.symbol: separate queues for each concurrency id

text: the /file= route has been fixed to prevent ssrf attacks: The /file= route no longer allows SSRF attacks; existing code relying on fetching arbitrary URLs via /file= will be blocked.

meta.symbol: the /file= route has been fixed to prevent ssrf attacks

text: gr.ClearButton now resets the value of gr.State to its initial value.
Stop using black for Python formatting; use ruff formatter instead.
multiple http libraries (requests and httpx): The codebase consolidated usage of requests and httpx into a single HTTP library; existing code relying on the specific library may break.
older version of huggingface_hub: The huggingface_hub dependency version has been updated; code relying on the old version may break.
api server set from environment variable: The Gradio API server URL can now be set from an environment variable; existing hardcoded URLs may be overridden.

meta.symbol: api server set from environment variable

text: images were not rotated to upright position during preprocess: Images are now automatically rotated to upright position during preprocess, which may change the orientation of images that had EXIF rotation metadata.

meta.symbol: images were not rotated to upright position during preprocess

text: Audio length errors now use gr.Error instead of generic exceptions, which may change how your error handling catches these errors.

meta.symbol: audio length errors now use gr.error

text: FileData.orig_name is now optional on the frontend; code that assumes it is always present may break.
image component (for editing): ImageEditor is a new separate component from Image; code using Image for editing capabilities must switch to ImageEditor.
Stop using `api_key` parameter; use `hf_token` instead.
Uploading a new image to gr.Image now clears out the previous image instead of keeping it.
The clear button on gr.Image now triggers a change event.
The change event on gr.Image no longer fires infinitely.
Uploaded images in gr.Image now preserve their original file names.
The upload event on gr.Image now triggers correctly.
Pasting an image from clipboard into gr.Image now triggers an upload event.
audio output events were not dispatched: Audio output events are now dispatched correctly.

meta.symbol: audio output events were not dispatched

text: the websockets library was a dependency: The websockets library has been removed as a dependency.

meta.symbol: the websockets library was a dependency

text: ffmpeg is now only a dependency of video: ffmpeg has been moved to be a dependency of the Video component only, not the core package.

meta.symbol: ffmpeg is now only a dependency of video

text: The selected indices in gr.Dropdown now update when the value changes programmatically.
**kwargs parameter in queue(): Stop passing **kwargs to queue() as they have been removed.
radio.select passes the selected value to the function: gr.Radio's .select event now passes the selected value to the function instead of the previous value.

meta.symbol: radio.select passes the selected value to the function

text: gr.ChatInterface no longer overwrites the initial message.
websockets-based queue (optional): Gradio's built-in queuing system now uses Server-Side Events instead of Websockets and is enabled by default for every app.
api endpoints exposed by default (needed api_open=false to close): Gradio app API endpoints are now closed by default; you must explicitly set api_open=True to expose them.

text: images serialized to base64 before sending to/from server: Images are no longer serialized into base64 before sending to the server or on the way back.

text: user's working directory exposed by default when releasing a gradio app: Gradio no longer exposes a user's working directory by default when releasing an app.

text: `**kwarg` parameter on every component: Stop passing arbitrary unused keyword arguments to component constructors; they are no longer accepted.
Stop using `plain` as a parameter for `gr.Button`; use `variant='secondary'` instead.
Stop using `gr.Carousel`, `gr.StatusTracker`, and `gr.Box`; they have been removed.
Stop using `gr.Variable`; use `gr.State` instead.
`.style()` method on component classes: Stop calling `.style()` on component instances; the method has been removed.
`.update()` method on component classes: Stop calling `.update()` on component instances; the method has been removed.

`get_interpretation_neighbors()` and `get_interpretation_scores()` methods: Stop calling `get_interpretation_neighbors()` and `get_interpretation_scores()` on component classes; they have been removed.
`source` parameter (singular): Stop using `source=` in `gr.Audio` and `gr.Video`; use `sources=` instead.
Stop passing `show_edit_button` to `gr.Audio`; the parameter has been removed.
Stop using `tool=` in `gr.Image()`; use the new `gr.ImageEditor` component instead.
`status_tracker` parameter on events: Stop passing `status_tracker` to event handlers; it has been removed.
`huggingfacedatasetjsonsaver` class: Stop using `HuggingFaceDatasetJSONSaver`; the class has been removed.

`blocks.load()` used as both class method and instance method: Stop calling `Blocks.load()` as a class method; use `gr.load()` instead. `Blocks.load()` is now only an instance method to attach a page-load event.

meta.symbol: `blocks.load()` used as both class method and instance method

text: `interface.load()` method: Stop using `Interface.load()`; it has been removed.
Stop passing `enable_queue` to `launch()`; it has been removed.
Stop passing positional arguments to `launch()` for parameters that are now keyword-only; use keyword arguments instead.
Stop passing `show_tips` to `launch()`; it has been removed.
flagged data saved as filepath for media and chatbot: Flagged data for media and chatbot components is now saved as JSON instead of file paths.

text: `gr.series` and `gr.parallel` classes: Stop using `gr.Series` and `gr.Parallel`; they have been removed.

meta.symbol: `api_name=none` defaults to the python function name

text: json data (chatbot, label, json) returned as filepath; input required filepath: When using the Client libraries, JSON data from components like `gr.Chatbot`, `gr.Label`, and `gr.JSON` is now passed and returned directly as JSON instead of file paths.

meta.symbol: json data (chatbot, label, json) returned as filepath; input required filepath

text: working directory is not served by default; must use allowed_paths in launch(): Stop relying on /file= route serving local files from the working directory; explicitly list files or directories in the allowed_paths parameter of launch()

meta.symbol: working directory is not served by default; must use allowed_paths in launch()

text: concurrency_count global parameter in queue: Stop using concurrency_count; it has been removed. Use max_threads for total threads and per-event concurrency_limit instead.
