text: raise_error=false only suppresses errors from non-200 status codes: raise_error=False now only suppresses errors from completed responses with non-200 status codes, not all errors.

meta.symbol: raise_error=false only suppresses errors from non-200 status codes

text: Stop passing callback to AsyncHTTPClient.fetch; use the coroutine interface instead.
Stop using HTTPServerRequest.write; use request.connection methods instead.
Stop using IOLoop.set_blocking_signal_threshold, set_blocking_log_threshold, log_stack, and handle_callback_exception; they have been removed.
Stop passing streaming_callback to BaseIOStream.read_bytes and read_until_close; they have been removed.
Stop using TornadoReactor and TwistedIOLoop from tornado.platform.twisted; they have been removed.
Stop using Python 3.7; the minimum supported Python version is now 3.8.
Stop using get_secure_cookie; use get_signed_cookie instead.
Stop using set_secure_cookie; use set_signed_cookie instead.
Stop using clear_all_cookies; use clear_cookie on individual cookies instead.

expectlog matches warning and above regardless of current logging config (unless level argument is used): ExpectLog now matches WARNING and above regardless of current logging configuration, unless the level argument is used.

meta.symbol: expectlog matches warning and above regardless of current logging config (unless level argument is used)

text: Stop passing the io_loop argument to tornado.autoreload.start; it has been removed.
Stop using tornado.concurrent.TracebackFuture; it has been removed.
Stop passing the io_loop argument to tornado.concurrent.run_on_executor; it has been removed.
Stop passing the io_loop argument to the CurlAsyncHTTPClient constructor; it has been removed.
io_loop arguments: Stop passing the io_loop argument to YieldFuture and with_timeout; they have been removed.
Stop passing the io_loop argument to any AsyncHTTPClient constructor; it has been removed.
Stop passing the io_loop argument to the HTTPServer constructor; it has been removed.
callbacks run immediately (blocking) when setting result: Setting the result of a Future no longer blocks while callbacks run; callbacks are scheduled on the next IOLoop iteration instead.

meta.symbol: callbacks run immediately (blocking) when setting result

text: tornado.gen.timeouterror (separate class): tornado.gen.TimeoutError is now an alias for tornado.util.TimeoutError instead of a separate class.
Content-Length and Transfer-Encoding headers are no longer sent with 1xx or 204 responses.

meta.symbol: content-length and transfer-encoding headers are no longer sent with 1xx or 204 responses

text: When closing a connection to an HTTP/1.1 client, the Connection: close header is now sent with the response.

meta.symbol: connection: close header was not sent when closing connection to http/1.1 client

text: behavior when multiple headers present (unspecified): If more than one X-Scheme or X-Forwarded-Proto header is present, only the last is used.
Stop using IOLoop.set_blocking_signal_threshold() and IOLoop.set_blocking_log_threshold(); use PYTHONASYNCIODEBUG=1 instead.
io_loop argument to caresresolver: Stop passing io_loop to CaresResolver; it is removed.
Stop passing io_loop to TornadoReactor, TwistedResolver, or twisted.install; they are removed.

meta.symbol: io_loop arguments to tornadoreactor, twistedresolver, and tornado.platform.twisted.install

text: Stop passing io_loop to Subprocess() or Subprocess.initialize; it is removed.

meta.symbol: io_loop argument to subprocess constructor and subprocess.initialize

text: io_loop argument to simpleasynchttpclient: Stop passing io_loop to SimpleAsyncHTTPClient; it is removed.
Stop passing io_loop to TCPClient(); it is removed.
Stop passing io_loop to TCPServer(); it is removed.
io_loop argument to websocket_connect: Stop passing io_loop to websocket_connect; it is removed.
Stop using tornado.testing.get_unused_port and tornado.testing.LogTrapTestCase; they are removed.
Replace tornado.gen.TimeoutError and tornado.ioloop.TimeoutError with tornado.util.TimeoutError.
TCPServer no longer logs EBADF errors during shutdown; code relying on those logs will miss them.

meta.symbol: tcpserver no longer logs ebadf errors during shutdown

text: asynchttptestcase.fetch connected to localhost: AsyncHTTPTestCase.fetch now connects to 127.0.0.1 instead of localhost, which may affect IPv6-dependent tests.

if both if-none-match and if-modified-since are present, if-modified-since is now ignored: If both If-None-Match and If-Modified-Since headers are present in a request to StaticFileHandler, If-Modified-Since is now ignored.

meta.symbol: if both if-none-match and if-modified-since are present, if-modified-since is now ignored

text: response is raised or returned directly: If a server returns a 3xx response code without a Location header, the response is now raised or returned directly instead of trying and failing to follow the redirect.

meta.symbol: response is raised or returned directly

text: methods other than post are no longer transformed into get on redirect: When following redirects, methods other than POST will no longer be transformed into GET requests.

meta.symbol: methods other than post are no longer transformed into get on redirect

text: tornado.stack_context module existed: The tornado.stack_context module has been removed.
asynchronous decorator existed: The asynchronous decorator has been removed.
The callback argument to RequestHandler.flush has been removed.
wsgiapplication and wsgiadapter existed: WSGIApplication and WSGIAdapter have been removed.
AsyncTestCase now cancels all pending coroutines in tearDown, which may cause asyncio.CancelledError to be logged in other places.

meta.symbol: all pending coroutines are cancelled in teardown, potentially causing asyncio.cancellederror
